title: Trying to create a MAGAZINE ISSUE with invalid data types
gherkin:
When the user tries to create a "MAGAZINE ISSUE" with the following data
  | key                    | value |
  | title                  | true  |
  | consecutive_number     | true  |
  | issue_number           | true  |
  | issue_year             | true  |
  | release_date           | true  |
  | single_copy_price      | true  |
  | single_copy_price_unit | true  |
  | pages                  | true  |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
